name: ml-scoring-select-drift
description: Diagnose "KeyError: ['feat_a', 'feat_b', ...] not in index" in ML scoring/inference pipelines immediately after a feature-bundle retrain. Three cascading causes: (1) asymmetric loaders (training SELECT * vs scoring hardcoded SELECT), (2) silent `if col in df.columns` preprocessing guards, (3) Dataform incremental CREATE-TABLE-IF-NOT-EXISTS schema trap. Includes four permanent defense patterns and a CI parity-test spec.
